programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson drops into the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire based on her new movie, Trolls: World Tour, where the chefs are tasked with combining colorful ingredients from six different musical ‘lands’ to make one delicious dish. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs are split into two teams to create a cohesive, progressive vegetarian meal for Padma, Tom, Gail and James Beard nominated guest judge Jeremy Fox. The catch is they won’t know what ingredients they’ll be working with until the morning of the challenge when they shop exclusively at the Santa Monica Farmers Market.

They may get help from their visiting loved ones, but for one chef, the help won’t save them from being sent home. Celebrity Chef Nancy Silverton is the guest judge joining Tom, Padma and Gail.

programme.desc: A Cinderella story of sorts, Mariah Carey. Songbird Supreme. Queen of Christmas. Dedicated philanthropist. Mariah has sold over 220 million records and released the best-selling Christmas album ever.

programme.title: Kamala Harris: The Next President
programme.desc: This documentary explores Kamala Harris's rise from her early life in California to becoming the first female Vice President of the United States, her impact on American politics, and her potential path to becoming the first female President.

programme.title: Lady Gaga: Dance Or Die
programme.desc: From underground clubs to global superstardom, Lady Gaga: Dance or Die explores the unstoppable rise of the pop icon who redefined music, fashion, and fame. Through triumphs and tribulations, witness how Gaga danced through life’s challenges — and won.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Madonna’s first manager Camille Barbone, dancer Carlton Wilborn, Evita studio executive Lauren Lloyd, plus many more.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Denzel Washington: American Icon
programme.desc: This in-depth documentary explores the remarkable journey of Denzel Washington, a powerhouse actor who has redefined what it means to be a leading man in Hollywood.

programme.title: Morgan Freeman: His Incredible Story
programme.desc: Journey through the life of Morgan Freeman—his struggles, triumphs, and legendary voice that shaped Hollywood and beyond.

programme.title: David Attenborough: A Life on Earth
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough, a legendary communicator and educator, has traveled the world for over six decades, inspiring millions with his captivating storytelling and bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: Rafael Nadal: King of Clay
programme.desc: This documentary delves into the life of tennis legend Rafael Nadal, exploring his journey from a young prodigy to a global icon. Through triumphs and challenges, it reveals the dedication that defines Nadal’s legacy on and off the court.

programme.title: Oceans Africa
programme.desc: This episode follows the journeys of these magnificent humpbacks, from their feeding grounds to their breeding grounds, the tender moments between mother and calf, and see the dangers their calves face in their first few months, including incredible interactions with predatory killer whales. The humpbacks also face a world full of human threats, from large container ships, to the impact of seismic testing in the search for oil and gas, now threatening their very survival once more.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Boots
programme.desc: Dr Karl gets a real kick out of discovering how leather boots are made at a factory in South Australia. From first cut to final polish, making a boot from a single piece of leather requires over 80 individual processes.

programme.title: Restoration Australia - Lamb House, QLD
programme.desc: Host Anthony Burke meets a Brisbane couple determined to return a vandalised, graffiti-daubed wreck to its rightful place as one of the city's finest mansions, no matter the cost.

programme.title: Larapinta - Episode 3

Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

A perfect mix of scenic hikes and soul-warming food—this is an episode you don’t want to miss!

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu! - EP 6

Easy to clean, built to last, and stylish, it makes every meal a delight and is the perfect choice for a modern, premium kitchen. 升级厨房体验，选择德国制造的 Fissler Stardust Forte！时尚耐用，10层钛强化 Protectal® 不粘涂层，即使烹饪重口味菜肴也不粘、不焦。人体工学手柄握感舒适稳固，防滴漏锅边避免溢出，CookStar®锅底适用所有炉具（含电磁炉），加热均匀、省心省力。易清洁、耐用又有型，让每一餐都成为享受，是现代高端厨房的理想之选。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - I-Running X-Fold Exercise Bike

programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。
